allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\setty\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\SPIRA\\apps\\api"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "pnpm" -ArgumentList "dev" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\spira-api.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\spira-api-err.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\spira-api.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\spira-api-err.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 10)
PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/v1/health" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { $r.StatusCode; $r.Content } else { "Not responding" })
